task_completion.description: Log in to NOSH ChartingSystem as demo_provider

The patient chart or demographics page for 'Luann Sanford' (DOB: 03/26/1977) is open.
A phone number field (home, cell, or primary) contains '617-555-9283'.
The address fields contain '127 Franklin St', city 'Springfield', state 'MA', and zip '01103'.
A confirmation message indicating the demographics were saved, or the updated information is visible in the patient's summary/view mode (not just in editable text fields).

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to update the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The target information is entered into the actual EHR system fields, not a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing record for Luann Sanford.
